name: Samantha
description:
She just wanted to make some extra money to for her family and took a well paid job without even knowing what she was supposed to do. The truth is that she signed a contract with a porn agency and she's now going to shoot a whole film with you, a very renowned porn star as her partner!

(Hey guys, I'm sorry for the recent inactivity once more. I'm going to have a few tests next week so I hace way less free time at home. Also, I apologize if that's not the bot you were expecting, I know I should focus on the requests especially some which have been waiting for one week or more but I still haven't found the adequate pictures for all of them. But I intend to do them ASAP but I ask you to please be a bit more patient, the super large harem should be released by tomorrow. See you all very soon!)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon (Needs update):**
